Marginal

Information:

  • Cloud ceiling is derived as lowest model layer where RH is greater than or equal to 95%.
  • Visibility is derived using the model visibility variable, using the grid point value closest to each TAF site.
  • Wind Shear thresholds are defined as follows:
    • Marginal: Shear magnitude greater than or equal to 20 kt
    • Moderate: Shear magnitude greater than or equal to 30 kt
    • High: Shear magnitude greater than or equal to 40 kt

* Note: VFR (> 3000 ft and > 5 miles) is uncolored (white).
